title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (only CC update)
scenario: During a 1-step DFU with an outdated Charge Case, placing both earbuds in the case after 20% completion shows a Houston screen instead of expected behavior during a CC update.
steps: Start a 1-step DFU process with Osprey and an outdated Charge Case.
Wait until the DFU is over 20% complete.
Place both earbuds into the Charge Case.
expected: The app should show the expected behavior (e.g., normal DFU progress screen).
